% This is generated by ESQL's CommandDocsTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

```esql
FROM employees
| WHERE emp_no NOT IN (FROM employees | WHERE languages IN (1, 2) | KEEP emp_no)
    AND emp_no IN (FROM employees | WHERE salary > 70000 | KEEP emp_no)
    AND languages > 0
| SORT emp_no
| KEEP emp_no, languages, salary
```

| emp_no:integer | languages:integer | salary:integer |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 10007 | 4 | 74572 |
| 10045 | 3 | 74970 |
| 10097 | 3 | 71165 |
